arts.sum: "When I told him that I had an option to move to Germany, Harry didn't want to even hear about that," said Corluka. Although his time at Spurs ended on a low note following that Leverkusen loan, he went on to achieve great success with Lokomotiv Moscow, winning one Russian Premier League title and four Russian Cups over nine years.
